commentary: Noor strikes gold for the Titans! It's the googly again, pitching just outside off stump, Head goes for the slog sweep but completely misses it, and the furniture is rattled.

name: MA Agarwal
commentary: The pressure has told on Mayank! Shorter length ball, 137ks, tucking up Mayank, who goes for the swivel pull but the line had tucked him up so he couldn't get a free swing going, Nalkande pockets a simple catch at deep square leg

name: Abhishek Sharma
commentary: Soft dismissal. Slower ball, on a length on off stump, Abhishek is too early into an attempted off drive, so he can only slice that straight to Gill at extra cover. Completely lost his balance on that shot, the bottom hand came off the bat as well.

name: AK Markram
commentary: Markram's timed that one too well, and that is his undoing! Length ball from Umesh, Markram plays the on-drive aerially, hits it too well, Rashid runs forward, slides and pouches it. The home fans are ecstatic!

name: H Klaasen
commentary: Massive moment in the game! Rashid bids goodbye to Klaasen. Flatter delivery, on a length and attacking the stumps, Klaasen looks to go back and mow it over midwicket, misses it and sees his stumps rearranged. Rashid has his hands aloft, Gill is ecstatic, and rightfully so.

name: Shahbaz Ahmed
commentary: back of the hand slower ball again, Shahbaz gets absolutely no timing on it, and ends up clonking it straight up in the air, Tewatia runs in from long-on to complete an easy catch

name: Abdul Samad
commentary: slower short ball again, Cummins again doesn't time the pull shot well enough, and can only find square leg. They keep running off that last ball, and Samad ends up being run out

name: Washington Sundar
commentary: Off cutter this time, dug in short, Washington connects nicely with the pull, but doesn't get enough power behind it and hits it straight to Rashid at deep midwicket. Samad is disappointed at being starved of the strike here.

name: Shubman Gill
commentary: Gill holes out to long-on. Mistake in execution cos the ball was in his slot. Slow on leg, 89ks, he danced down and probably got too close to the pitch. Maybe he wanted to go wider. Markande and SRH will take that with both hands

name: B Sai Sudharsan
commentary: Pulled, holes out to deep midwicket. Was a length ball that was hit from deep in the crease, Sudharsan tried to clear Abhishek but a sliding catch was taken in the end

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: RR Pant
commentary: full outside off. Pant goes aerial but ends up slicing it as the bottom hands comes off. It goes miles in the air and Ruturaj Gaikwad, who was settling under it at long-off, had to dive to his left to pouch it

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: MR Marsh
commentary: 150.4kph and the middle stump is out of the ground. An excellent yorker that moves in a touch to beat Marsh's bat and rattle the woodwork

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: T Stubbs
commentary: off stump is flat on the ground this time. Another searing yorker, at 149kph. Stubbs had no clue as the ball crashed into the off and middle stumps

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: AR Patel

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: Abishek Porel

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: R Ravindra
commentary: short, this time he connects... and a mishit to mid-on ends Ravindra's stay! That had been coming, second wicket for Khaleel. It was all yellow for Ravindra, but not in the good way. Couldn't get his rhythm and then finally chips a pull straight up. There were two fielders competing to take the catch but in the end Stubbs makes it safe with a tumbling effort running across from mid-off

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: AM Rahane
commentary: plinked to long-on, Mukesh strikes! Perfectly executed slower ball and Rahane holes out. Just a little offcutter wide of the stumps and there was no pace for the batter to work with looking to go down the ground. Safely pouched several yards in from the rope. DC tightening their grip

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: S Dube
commentary: short with pace off, slapped to long-off! Stand and deliver from Dube but it's gone first class down the throat of Stubbs. Third wicket for Mukesh, who's only bowled seven balls so far

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: Sameer Rizvi
commentary: bounce, edged, taken! Lovely stuff from Mukesh, and Rizvi goes first ball! Searching line on off stump and he was looking to close the face, got a thick edge to short third where Khaleel held on to a sharp catch

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: RA Jadeja

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: MS Dhoni
Ishan Kishan
commentary: This is Test-match cricket, says Sanjay Manjrekar on air, and that's pretty much it. Bolt-upright seam, good - nay - perfect length. Lands around off, straightens off the deck and Kishan tries punching it straight. The movement finds the outside edge and the keeper takes it. A bit of extra bounce too that had Kishan hopping. Burger leaps in delight.

name: RG Sharma
commentary: Edged and taken first ball! What a ball to silence the crowd! 132ks, scrambled-seam, on a length, lands around off and goes through the channel. It opens up Rohit on the straight-bat defence and takes the outside edge. Low carry to Samson's right but he dives and takes it well

name: Naman Dhir
commentary: Lightning Boult strikes twice! Given out lbw but it's been reviewed. On a length again but this one comes in. Naman tried pushing it towards mid-on but the movement meant there was a big gap between bat and ball. Hit on the knee-roll while on the front foot. Hawk-Eye shows it'd go on to clip leg stump. Two in two to end the over. He'll be on a hat-trick for the start of his next over?

name: D Brevis
commentary: Loose shot, taken at short third! Three in four for the lightning Boult that strikes thrice. Length on fifth, Brevis' front stride to a ball angling away meant it was outside his reach for an off-drive.

name: NT Tilak Varma
commentary: RR don't have to worry about Tilak farming strike anymore as Chahal gets him with a wide ball. On a length, had him reach out. Might've even been wide had he left it but he committed to the cut. Googly too, which meant it spun away further, the edge was found and the ball ballooned to short third's left. Good leaping take from Ashwin

name: HH Pandya
commentary: Chahal has Hardik hole out! 86ks but flattish, landed around middle and leg and Hardik stood in the crease and tried to club it over long-on. Front leg was out of the way, could he have danced down to that? Got it off the bottom, Powell moved to the right and took a stumbling catch.

name: TH David
commentary: David can't finish on a high. Burger goes into the pitch, angles in at the body. It's pulled from deep in the crease, flat and to Boult at the long-leg boundary, who takes it just while jogging to the right. Maybe David was expecting the slower one too there

name: G Coetzee
commentary: Softie to cover. Chahal winning the invitational with a 76ks legbreak. Fullish, lands around fifth and turns away a bit. Coetzee looked to drive on the up, didn't try and muscle it but ended up spooning it Hetmyer

name: YBK Jaiswal
commentary: Maphaka gets Jaiswal! First wicket in the IPL for the 17-year-old! Pitched up on a full length outside off and shaping away from Jaiswal, who pushes at it. Ends up lobbing it straight to David at cover

name: JC Buttler
commentary: Pulled straight to deep fine leg! Bouncer on off at 134kph, Buttler looks for the pull, but hits it flat and straight to Piyush Chawla who makes no mistake.

name: SV Samson
commentary: Samson chops on! Madhwal bowls it short of good length outside off, Samson looks for a cut with no foot movement. Gets an underedge onto the stumps. Can this be a turning point?

name: R Ashwin
commentary: Madhwal has his third! Short ball jags in from outside off. Ashwin looks to turn it leg side but gets a leading edge that goes high in the air. Tilak takes a good catch running back from backward point. Did well to settle under that skier. Madhwal strikes again in his last over

name: Q de Kock
commentary: taken at long-off by Dagar again! A full toss outside off, as it dips on to the batter this time too. Topley went for the back-of-the-hand slower ball. De Kock went lofting back down the ground, but ended up giving a comfortable catch to long-off coming a few steps to his left

name: KL Rahul
commentary: taken at extra cover! Dagar keeps his eyes on the ball, which Rahul sent ballooning off outside half of the bat, and took it in front of his chest. Maxwell pulled his length back to go short and slightly wide of off. Rahul was in the mood for more, and got his front leg out of the way in trying to swat it away. But there was good bounce for the bowler, and the ball skied up for a catch

name: MP Stoinis
commentary: taken by Dagar! He was placed at point, and saw the ball come on to his right, as he moved a few steps and grabbed with both hands. Maxwell strikes again, as he bowls short and wide of off. Stoinis had backed away early, so the line of the ball meant that it was quite wide of him. He eventually reached out for it, and ended up swatting to the fielder

name: A Badoni
shortText: c du Plessis b Yash Dayal
commentary: well taken by du Plessis! The ball was dropping over his right shoulder, as placed at extra cover, he tumbled across to his right while watching the ball well. Dayal went for a bouncer, angling it across, while also changing the pace. The ball rose rather sharply, and was very wide of off. Badoni still went swatting, but ended up getting it off the outside half of the bat

name: V Kohli
commentary: Siddharth has his man! Kohli skies it to backward point! Full outside off, Kohli was coming down the crowd and going for the big shot. He just gets a leading edge and the ball loops to backward point's left. Padikkal makes no mistake and Siddharth is pumped as the Chinnaswamy goes silent

name: F du Plessis
commentary: Direct hit! Faf clips a full ball at 153.2kph towards midwicket and takes off. Padikkal is quick to pick up the ball and with one stump to aim at, absolutely nails it with du Plessis caught well short of the crease

name: RM Patidar
commentary: Top edge goes high in the air. Devdutt Padikkal makes no mistake at deep square leg! It's banged in short, Patidar goes for the pull and skies it. Devdutt Padikkal had to move around to settle under it, but never took his eyes off it and ends up grabbing it to send Patidar back in the hut. Mayank has his third!

name: Anuj Rawat
commentary: Rawat falls. Stoinis goes short around off as he sees Rawat advancing. Gets cramped for room and gets it off high on the bat to mid-on. Pooran has to take a few steps forward before grabbing it. Rawat has struggled today and gets out without much impact in the end

name: MK Lomror
commentary: That should be game, set and match. Full outside off, he looks to go over long-off, but hits it too flat and Nicholas Pooran makes absolutely no mistake. Lomror's counterattack ends

name: Mohammed Siraj
commentary: Oh, Nicholas Pooran you beauty! Siraj lofts Naveen straight down the ground, Pooran runs across from long-on and throws himself at it and holds on tumbling forward. And LSG have bowled RCB out to register a 28-run win!

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: PD Salt
commentary: now taken by Stubbs at mid-off! So Salt's luck doesn't last long. He stands deep in the crease, and a bit outside leg, looking to loft at this pretty full ball angling into the stumps. I think he was done in by the rapid pace there, with the ball seemingly skidding through.

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: SP Narine
commentary: tickled to Pant! It was a soft dismissal. Narine falls to the bouncer. It pitched on off, and climbed on rather sharply towards Narine. He was standing after backing away, and looked to pull. But the extra bounce meant the ball took the top edge to the keeper, who took it with a reverse cup in front his face

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: A Raghuvanshi
commentary: ramped to deep third! Ishant Sharma seemed to be at a straightish deep third, rather. Nortje went for the short ball around sixth stump, and the ball rose considerably. So Raghuvanshi went ramping while using the pace and bounce, but found the fielder on the edge of the boundary

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: AD Russell
commentary: wow, superb ball! An inswinging yorker at 144kph floors Russell - literally! It lands on the base of middle and leg, as Russell looks to jam his bat down with a horizontal bat, but is late. It is too quick for him, and he ends up on his stomach on the pitch

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: SS Iyer
commentary: taken at mid-off! Shreyas falls to the short ball. Khaleel bowled outside off, as the ball almost seemed to have rushed through to Shreyas, who went pulling but got it off the top edge. Stubbs kept his eyes on the skied ball, and took it reverse cupped

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: VR Iyer

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: Ramandeep Singh
commentary: nabbed at extra cover! DC are striking late to check KKR. A slower ball this time from Ishant, who went short and pretty wide of off. Ramandeep went swatting far away from his body at what was a tenth-stump ball, but ended up getting the toe end of the bat to Shaw's left for a simple catch

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: MR Marsh
commentary: Mitchell gets Mitchell! And that is Starc's first IPL 2024 wicket. Marsh looks to drive this full ball from his body and generates a lot of power on that shot, but not the height, and Ramandeep at cover point intuitively sticks both hands out at the right time. Marsh's poor form continues

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: Abishek Porel
commentary: short ball too good for Porel! Simple catch for short fine leg. Arora aims for a short ball at Porel's head, and he tries the pull while taking his eyes of the ball. Knocks the youngster over with a classic tall fast bowler's dismissal

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: RR Pant
commentary: this time Shreyas holds onto a catch off Varun's bowling! Tossed up ball, a bit wider outside off. Turning away and Pant also tries to go inside out over cover. Throws all his energy behind it but the shot is sliced and Shreyas at cover calls for that nice and early

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: T Stubbs
commentary: Stubbs' innings is over as he can't clear Starc at deep backward square leg. Varun bowls a quicker one that lands outside leg, and Stubbs doesn't get enough room for his hands to go through the bat swing. Taken well inside the boundary line

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: AR Patel
commentary: Manish Pandey joins the action now! Runs in from long on and takes a catch inside the circle that was swirling by diving forward. Varun enticed Axar with a tossed up ball just outside off and he went for the glory shot. Mistimed, very high in the air, and there was little doubt on Pandey's catching technique

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: Sumit Kumar
commentary: To deep midwicket! Full ball on off and middle. Turning into Sumit. With only tailenders remaining, he goes for a big shot over the leg side, but does not have the distance on this occasion either. Time out

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: Rasikh Salam
commentary: And Vaibhav gets a third! Goes for the tried-and-tested method of bouncer to a lower-order batter. Gets a shoulder-high ball to Rasikh outside off and he slices the pull to the wicketkeeper

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: A Nortje
commentary: length ball around off. Pulled but without much power, and taken by Shreyas on the leg side inside the circle! KKR win by 106 runs

venue: Dr. Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy ACA-VDCA Cricket Stadium, Visakhapatnam
name: I Sharma
B Sai Sudharsan
commentary: Has that been steered to the keeper? Jitesh goes big in appeal, Sudharsan walks. 128ks, shortish if not actually a bouncer. Line around fifth stump, height around the neck, the upper cut/ramp was attempted. He tried to go fine but got it off the cue end. Harshal did in fact put revs on it. Kudos to his fitness to bowl at that pace

name: V Shankar
commentary: No, Vijay tries to go for the boundary but flat bats it to long-off. Good catch by Brar, running in and takes it while sliding into the ground. Was shortish, slow and a touch wide.

name: JM Bairstow
commentary: Cracker of a delivery! Noor is off. He tosses it up and lands it on a length outside leg. Bairstow completely misses the line of the ball and leaves a small gab between bat and pad. He was also on the move. That gap is enough for the ball to sneak through and deflect off the back pad to rattle the stumps. Another failure for YJB

name: Prabhsimran Singh
commentary: Flummoxed! Noor tosses up the googly around middle and off, Prabhsimran is early in backing away, and has made his mind to go across the line. All he manages is a top edge and Mohit at short third has hardly had to move. Kings slide steadily

name: SM Curran
commentary: Catching practice! Curran wanted to swivel and pull to exploit the space between deep square leg and long-on. But he does not manage to get the elevation. Omarzai bowls it on a shortish length on leg at 135.1kph, Curran swivels and hits it straight to Williamson at short midwicket

name: JM Sharma
commentary: Rashid gets a wicket off a full toss! He cannot believe it. Gill knows it is a bonus. They share a laugh. Jitesh cannot believe what he has done and is down on his haunches. He gives it his all and only skies it to Nalkande at deep midwicket. Kings still in the game but they need someone to stay in with Shashank. This is Rashid's 50th wicket for Titans

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: R Ravindra
commentary: Bhuvneshwar Kumar has a first wicket in IPL 2024! He will be a relieved man. Was a back of a length ball outside off. He looks to go down the ground but the ball gets big on him. He ends up slicing it straight up and mid-on settles under it comfortably

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: AM Rahane
commentary: Taken by backward point and Unadkat ends Rahane's misery. Slower offcutter bowled at 105kph outside off. Was fuller in length as Rahane looked to go over cover. Gets it off the cue end of the bat and Markande takes a good catch behind him

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: S Dube
commentary: Soft dismissal and captain Cummins has the big fish! Slower bouncer outside off. He stays legside of the ball, deceived by the pace of the ball. He can only bunt it to backward point who takes the easiest of catches

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: RA Jadeja

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: MS Dhoni

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: TM Head
commentary: Ravindra almost messes it up! It was coming straight to him but he fumbled and managed to keep it in in the second attempt. And Head CANNOT believe what he has done - found the fielder perfectly. Theekshana tossed it up outside leg, the offspinner, the hit-me ball. Head obliged but not in the desired manner

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: Abhishek Sharma
commentary: End of the Abhishek Sharma show! The loud roar may not indicate that this is a home game for SRH. And Chahar is pumped up. Should have had a wicket in the opening over, but does so after taking a battering. Bowls it on a length outside off, Abhishek goes for a lofted shot over cover but slices it off the outer half. Jadeja runs to his right from backward point takes it reverse-cupped with a dive. Chahar exults

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: AK Markram
commentary: LBW appeal, given! Markram looks at the non-striker, who immediately asks him to go for the review. Has that turned a bit too much? Moeen tosses it up and lands it on a length outside off, Markram goes for the reverse sweep but misses because of the spin. Three reds and huge cheers in Hyderabad. Should make the list of soft dismissals for Markram, having looked at complete ease upto this point

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: Shahbaz Ahmed
commentary: Moeen and Dhoni appeal for lbw. You could almost not hear it. And next scene, they signal for DRS. Tossed up full on middle and leg, Shahbaz goes for the reverse sweep. Looks to have missed it. Did it pitch in line? Did it miss the bat? Replays taking time to load. No bat involved. And three reds again! Moeen strikes twice in two overs. Shahbaz looked unusually jittery this over

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: H Klaasen
F du Plessis
commentary: Chahal has his man this time, keeps the line wide and has Faf fetching. Holed out to long-on. Buttler ran across to the left, held his balance and took it low. Faf tried to heave it across. The length was there but he danced down and Chahal went wider. Faf continued trying to break free, perishes in the process. His off-day might be a big issue for the day but might be a bigger worry big-picture wise

name: YBK Jaiswal
commentary: gottim, Jaiswal goes for a duck. Takes a step out of his crease and Topley responds by digging the ball short outside off. Gets it to bounce awkwardly as Jaiswal looks to drag a pull from well outside his body, and ends up skewing a top-edge high in the air for Glenn Maxwell to get under at mid-off. Just the start RCB wanted

name: SV Samson
shortText: c Yash Dayal b Mohammed Siraj
commentary: got him, Siraj ends the partnership with a well-directed short ball. Angles it in, gets it to bounce to shoulder height, cramps Samson for room. He takes on the hook, and it almost comes off, but Dayal takes the catch at deep backward square leg with his right foot an inch short of the boundary cushion

name: R Parag
commentary: timed perfectly, and straight to the fielder. Back of a length, angling into off stump, flicked imperiously off the hip but straight into Kohli's hands at short midwicket. Catches it in front of his right shoulder with the reverse-cup

name: DC Jurel
commentary: given, and Jurel goes to the old strangle down the leg side. Length ball down the leg side, looks to flick it away, gets a nice, audible inside edge and DK does the rest

name: RG Sharma
commentary: Through his defenses and didn't DC need that! Was bowled much quicker at 102.9kph and the ball skids through after pitching. Rohit is camped on the backfoot and pokes at it. Gets beaten and the ball clatters into the off pole

name: Ishan Kishan
commentary: That is an absolute stunner! Oh, my word AXAR! Flatter length ball on off stump, Kishan hops back and absolutely belts it to Axar's left. He flings out his left hand and takes a stunner. Surely, a contender for the catch of the tournament

name: SA Yadav
commentary: A two-ball duck for Suryakumar Yadav on return. On a length on middle and leg, he looks to clear mid-on but does not get the right of timing on it. Jake Fraser-McGurk, out as a substitute, runs back and takes a good catch, reverse-cupped.

name: HH Pandya
commentary: Knee-high full toss and Hardik can only help it to deep backward square leg. He goes for 39 off 33. Was there to be hit. The ball was leg stump, but Hardik just didn't get enough bat on that. Another catch for Jake Fraser-McGurk

name: NT Tilak Varma
commentary: Straight to backward point and Mumbai are losing their way! Was a short and wide ball, there to be hit. He looks to go up and over point, but does not get on top of the bounce. Cuts it straight to Axar who is having a good day on the field. The ball was travelling.

name: Abishek Porel
commentary: heaves this full toss straight to long-on. No control or timing on that shot, hit it off the bottom. Easy as catches go.

name: RR Pant
commentary: strange little innings from Pant is over. Was looking to helicopter this over midwicket, ends up getting a leading edge to cover. Didn't look in any control today.

name: AR Patel
commentary: heaved sown to wide long-on, they'll take two. Wonder if Stubbs needed to take a single off the third ball. But anyway, what's happened here is Axar has been run out at the striker's end because of some lazy running. He was ambling for the second, under the assumption no one was in a hurry. Kishan didn't give any hint of the throw coming his way. But then suddenly gathered the throw and broke the bails to catch him a few yards short. Tardy from Axar.

name: K Kushagra
commentary: sliced over the infield to point, as easy as catches come for Tilak. Kushagra was looking to go down the ground but the ball got away from his arc.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: Q de Kock
commentary: gone this time! Umesh Yadav has the early breakthrough! Back of a length delivery on leg stump, and this seems to just hold in the surface a shade. de Kock tries to repeat the dose from earlier in the over but ends up swiping across it a touch early. The ball skews up off the leading edge towards third man, where Noor runs in a few yards, settles under it and catches it in front of his face. Just the start LSG would not have wanted!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: KL Rahul
commentary: Rahul tries to go big, and perishes! This is right in the slot, just outside off, and it is there to be hit. Rahul decides to go downtown but loses his shape just a little. Gets it off the toe-end, and Tewatia, stationed at long on, settles under it, completing the catch comfortably. Rahul is not happy with himself, and he walks back having scored just 33 off 31!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: MP Stoinis
commentary: two sixes and out! Nalkande gets the big fish! Back of a length on middle and off. Stoinis, fresh after two sixes, decides to make it three in the over. The ball seems to stick just a little and Stoinis loses his shape too. Goes straight up off the toe-end, and Sharath, despite circling under it nervously, snares the chance in the end!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: N Pooran

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: A Badoni
commentary: holes out to deep mid wicket! Googly on a length on middle and off. Badoni seems to pick it and looks for the slog sweep. This has been bowled a little slower, though, meaning that Badoni has to drag it. Does not have enough behind the stroke and picks out Umesh to perfection!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: KH Pandya

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: B Sai Sudharsan
commentary: Sudharsan falls too! What is happening to the Titans' run-chase!? Shortish on middle and leg, and this seems to just hold in the surface. Sudharsan swishes across the line and the lack of pace means that the ball skews up off the top edge. Bishnoi settles under it at deep mid wicket, and after his exploits in the previous over, that is an absolute soda. GT losing their way!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: Shubman Gill
commentary: cleans him up! Full, fast and straight. Gill misses and Thakur hits. It seemed to angle in just a smidgen and ended up much closer to middle and leg than Gill expected. He tried to flick it away but was beaten for pace too, and heard the death rattle soon after! Thakur is delighted, and he lets out a roar of celebration. Is this the window of opportunity that LSG were after?

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: V Shankar
commentary: Vijay Shankar bites the dust now! Short, wide and Shankar could have smashed that anywhere. The only problem, though, is that this seems a bit of a change-up. Shankar tries to smash it into next week and all he does in the end is feather it through to Rahul. Thakur holds his arms aloft, and GT are now 93-6!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: DG Nalkande
commentary: Krunal has three! A real long-hop, outside leg and quite short too. Nalkande tries to help it on its way but all he manages is to pick out his Vidarbha teammate Yash Thakur at short fine leg. Nalkande cannot quite believe what he has done, but he has to walk back!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: R Tewatia
commentary: Yash Thakur gets Tewatia, and these are his best figures in the IPL now! Takes pace off again, and bowls it on a shortish length on the stumps. Tewatia tries muscling it over deep backward square leg but the lack of pace means he arrows it straight down Pooran's throat. LSG just one wicket away from breaking their winless streak against the Titans!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: Rashid Khan
shortText: c sub (DJ Hooda) b Yash Thakur
commentary: Thakur has two in the over, and the Titans' chase continues to flag! Hard length outside off. A change of pace too. Rashid skips down the track, trying to muscle it over mid off. Does not get the power, the elevation or the timing, and he offers some catching practice to mid off. The Titans staring down the barrel now!

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: SH Johnson

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: Noor Ahmad
shortText: c de Kock b Yash Thakur
commentary: five for Yash Thakur! And the IPL hoodoo against the Gujarat Titans has been broken! Sharp short ball just outside off. Gets awfully big on Noor as he tries to smear it away. Goes straight up and the catch is taken comfortably by de Kock at mid on! What a win for the Super Giants and after their opening game defeat, they have now reeled off three wins on the spin!

name: PD Salt
commentary: straight to point first ball! And Jadeja is not missing that. Perfect start for CSK. Deshpande with a wide ball outside off and he tried to drive, but plays it away from his body. The length wasn't right for the drive either, and CSK strike first ball.

name: SP Narine
commentary: Jadeja strikes again! Gets a length ball to drift and land outside off. Keeps it away from Narine's arc but doesn't stop the batter from attempting a shot anyway. Slices a flat-batted effort over the off side but long off gets in position early for a reverse-cup catch

name: A Raghuvanshi
commentary: out playing the reverse sweep! First wicket for a CSK spinner at Chepauk! Length ball on middle stump and going straight on. Raghuvanshi changes his stance to attempt a reverse sweep, but the wily Jadeja outsmarts the young Raghuvanshi. Hits his pads in front of middle stump, and KKR will not review this. Raghuvanshi was probably expecting a fuller ball there.

name: SS Iyer
commentary: A 100th catch for Jadeja in the IPL! Cutter, off a good length and angling away. Shreyas tries to clobber a six over the leg side, but the connection is poor. Jadeja is at deep midwicket, so Shreyas can begin starting to walk back even before the catch is completed.

name: VR Iyer
commentary: over the stumps to Venkatesh Iyer, and he has struck right away! A pure half-tracker angling into Iyer and he tries to pull. But Venkatesh has totally mistimed this freebie delivery, and he holes out at deep midwicket diving in the deep! Three wickets for Jadeja in eight deliveries!

name: Ramandeep Singh
commentary: Theekshana with a terrific response! Good length ball around off and the carrom ball zips through. Ramandeep makes some room to play a cut, but he's been deceived, and his middle stump has been rocked back. Ramandeep stands in disbelief before dragging himself out

name: AD Russell
commentary: Deshpande adds a third! Fullish ball outside off, but with pace off. Russell tries to tonk it over long on, but it is mistimed. Mitchell at long on gets around and then takes the catch. Deshpande enjoyed that wicket, completes the celebration with a rodeo-style lasso loop

name: R Ravindra
commentary: he has picked out long-on! Wonder if Rachin forgot the field had been pushed back. This was short of length and outside off, he swung through the line but instinctively let out a groan as he saw the fielder near the ropes.

name: S Dube
commentary: looks to finish it off in style but misses this full and straight delivery and sees the stumps flattened. May have been better off trying to hit it straight rather than attempting a heave. As Dube was out, there's a roar that engulfs Chepauk. And that's because MS Dhoni is walking out to bat

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: TM Head
commentary: gone this time! Dhawan makes it look very easy! Full just outside off and Head's eyes light up. He tries to smash it to Chandigarh but loses his shape, cutting across it in the process. The ball goes straight up and Dhawan does brilliantly to track it over his shoulder from mid off. Keeps his eyes on the ball as it drops, and snaffles it up, with minimal fuss. Massive moment in the game!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Abhishek Sharma
commentary: did that carry? PBKS are celebrating! Back of a length outside off. Abhishek marches down the track, trying to carve it over cover. Steps too far outside leg, though, and gets it right off the toe-end. Floats towards cover point, where Shashank dives forward and snares a sharp chance!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: AK Markram
commentary: Arshdeep has two in the over, and SRH are rocking early! Back of a length in the channel, and this seems to jag away just a smidgen. Markram's feet go nowhere and he wafts at it. Feathers it through to Jitesh. The nick is acknowledged, and PBKS have two in very quick succession!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: H Klaasen
commentary: Harshal gets the big fish, and this is a huge moment in the game! Length ball on middle and off, and this seems to just hold in the surface a little. Klaasen tries to go downtown but miscues it. Clinks it off the bottom part of the bat, and arrows it straight to Curran at long off, who makes no mistake. PBKS are jubilant, SRH not quite!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Abdul Samad
commentary: holes out to deep backward point! Arshdeep set the trap, and he executes to perfection. Full and wide outside off. Samad flays at it but cannot control his stroke. Slices it and Harshal is stationed on the fence for exactly that stroke. A simple catch, and PBKS break what was looking like a threatening partnership!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Shahbaz Ahmed

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: PJ Cummins
commentary: Rabada has his first! Slower ball on a length on middle and off. Cummins clears his front leg and swings for the hills. Loses his shape completely and loses his stumps soon after. PBKS keep chipping away, and they are now in with a real chance to restrict SRH to a total under 170!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: B Kumar
commentary: straight to long off! In the slot outside off, and it is there to be hit. Bhuvneshwar gives it everything he has but clinks it off the toe-end. Bairstow takes a few paces in from long off, and does the rest. The new batter will be on strike for the final ball!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: JD Unadkat

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: JM Bairstow
commentary: cleans him up!! Hard length, bowled at 141.1kph. Slants into off stump and Bairstow, trying to impose himself, swipes across the line in ungainly fashion. Only swats away a few flies and hears the death rattle soon after. The move to share the new ball has worked a charm for Cummins, and this is just what SRH would have wanted!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Prabhsimran Singh
shortText: c Nitish Kumar Reddy b Kumar
commentary: this goes straight up, and Bhuvneshwar has his man! Length in the fifth stump channel. Seems destined to angle in but straightens just a shade after pitching. Prabhsimran walks down the track and looks to whip it away over mid wicket. Skews it off the leading edge, and Nitish, running back from cover point, gobbles it up. SRH have two in the powerplay!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: SM Curran
commentary: and Natarajan answers SRH's prayers! A blinder by Cummins at mid off! Hard length outside off, and this seems to rush off the pitch quicker than Curran anticipates. Hacks across the line and mistimes it. For the longest while, it seems it will evade Cummins at mid off until....he leaps up like a salmon high to his left and takes it with both hands. What a moment in the game, and SRH's captain has come up trumps!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Shashank Singh

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: JM Sharma
shortText: c Abhishek Sharma b Nitish Kumar Reddy
commentary: Jitesh holes out, and Nitish rises to the occasion again! Slower bumper on leg stump that is actually begging to be hit. Jitesh tries to smash it into next week and swings too early. Gets it right off the toe-end and rather than flying over fine leg, it spoons up towards deep square leg. Abhishek comes running in off the fence, slides forward and completes the catch! PBKS keep slipping!

name: YBK Jaiswal
commentary: Umesh has the last laugh! Goes back to the back of a length ball, on middle and off. Jaiswal moves across his stumps, looking for the scoop. Gets cramped for room, though, and he gloves it through. Wade times his leap to absolute perfection and gobbles it up with both hands!

name: JC Buttler
commentary: straight to slip! Fizzed through on a full length on off. Buttler looks at the length, and his eyes light up. He tries to go downtown but is not quite to the pitch of the ball. It straightens just enough, and takes the outside edge. Tewatia snaffles up a sharp chance at slip in front of his face, and the Royals are two down now!

name: R Parag
commentary: Parag perishes! Slower ball that lands right in the slot outside off. Parag lines it up and belts it flat. It is straight to Shankar at long off, though. he takes the catch initially but then loses his balance a little. Keeps his nerve, does his juggling act, steps outside, comes back in and completes the catch!

name: B Sai Sudharsan
commentary: huge appeal, not given! Full and speared into middle and off. Sudharsan shapes for the lap but makes a complete hash of it. Seems to miss it completely and gets pinned on the pads, right in front of middle and off. Kumar Dharmasena has a long look at it, grimaces too but does not raise his finger. RR go upstairs. No bat involved. Ball Tracking coming up now and...it reckons the ball would have thundered into middle and off stump. Sen has a wicket in his first over!

name: Shubman Gill
commentary: stumped by a mile! Chahal outwits Gill, and this is a humongous moment in the game! Tossed up deliciously outside off and Gill thinks he can dance down and go inside out again. He runs down the track but to his dismay, finds that the ball is wider and shorter than he anticipated. Cannot get close enough to it and swishes at fresh air. Samson collects and then whips off the bails. Chahal points to his head, and even though that was called a wide, RR will not mind. Looks like this dismissal was plotted by Chahal and Maharaj. Gill, meanwhile, is utterly disconsolate!

name: MS Wade
commentary: wicket right after the rain break! 146.3kph length ball, angling across the batter outside off. Wade's feet are stuck to concrete and he has an airy waft at it. No shape on the stroke and he chunks it off the inside edge. Smashes into the stumps, and Sen has two in very quick succession!

name: A Manohar
commentary: off stump is flat on the ground! Kuldeep Sen is on absolute fire! Heat-seeking 144.9kph delivery, bowled on a hard length on off. Nips away against the angle and that squares up Manohar completely. His feet, like Wade, go nowhere and he prods at it in hope. The ball whistles past the outside edge and leaves his off stump in a mess! It is raining wickets after the rain break, and GT in all sorts of trouble now!

name: V Shankar
commentary: knocks Shankar over! Slider on a length on middle and off. Bowled at 93.3kph and Shankar does not really account for this change in pace. Tries to smash it into next week and loses track of it completely. Goes past the bat and Shankar hears the death rattle soon after. RR keep chipping away!

name: R Tewatia
commentary: Tewatia gets it over mid off, but it does not go for four! And there is a run out too! Short and wide outside off. Tewatia holds his nerve and slaps it over mid off. Buttler puts on his skates and pulls it back into play. The batters get across for two runs comfortably and then they decide to go for the third. Tewatia is always struggling to get there. The throw is accurate enough, and Avesh does the rest, with Tewatia well short. In the middle of all of that, there was a check for a short run. That has been sorted now, and GT need 2 off the last ball!

name: M Shahrukh Khan
commentary: Avesh traps Shahrukh in front! Low full toss slinging into off stump, Shahrukh walks across his stumps, swipes at it and misses. Gets pinged on the full, in front of middle and off, and the umpire raises his finger. Shahrukh has reviewed this because, well, why not. No bat involved, and three reds on Ball Tracking, with the ball pounding into middle stump!

name: V Kohli
commentary: Big man gets big man! Blockbuster stuff. Length ball around off but Bumrah gets it into Kohli with his wide release angle. Kohli looks to counterattack by swiping a shot to the leg side but the ball kisses his bat before going behind. Kishan dives to his left and pouches it

name: F du Plessis
commentary: taken by David at long on! Attacks the ball by running in and then dives forward to take a low catch. Bumrah bowls a shin-high full toss on middle, and Du Plessis tries to clobber Bumrah over long on, but he just couldn't get the bat under enough to generate power through the shot. Still, gone for a very important 61

name: RM Patidar
commentary: When the going gets tough, the tough get going! Bandana-wearing Coetzee runs in with fire, bangs it short, angles it in, and Patidar tries to pull. Gloved, and Kishan takes a simple one. Big roar from the South African and Patidar is fifty and out

name: MK Lomror
commentary: Toe-crusherrrrrr! Around the stumps to Lomror, and of course he is welcomed by the yorker. The batter can't get his toe out, and the ball hits him straight on the toe. Umpire Menon says that's out, but Lomror reviews before getting low to see if his toe is fine. Replay confirms this would've clipped the outside of leg stump and Lomror walks out gingerly.

name: V Vyshak
commentary: Five for the great man! Back of a length ball on an off-stump line. Cramps Vyshak up but that doesn't deter the batter from attempting a flat-batted shot. Mistimed to the man waiting at mid off. Rohit runs in to celebrate with Bumrah and simply bows at him to acknowledge this spell

name: Ishan Kishan
commentary: RCB have a wicket...finally! Akash Deep gets them the breakthrough. Slower bouncer on off stump. Kishan flat bats it without much timing and Kohli completes a simple catch at long-off

name: RG Sharma
commentary: Topley has taken an absolute stunner! Oh, my word! Catch of the tournament anyone? Fuller on middle and leg. Rohit slams the sweep, gets a good chunk on it, but Topley flings to his left, one hand out and plucks out a worldie of a catch.

name: SA Yadav
commentary: He's found the fielder. Was the height of the ball okay, though? Yep, it was. Very close, but just about alright. A full toss just below Surya's waist outside off. He scythes it but straight to deep point who takes a comfortable catch. A sensational knock from Surya comes to an end.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: Q de Kock
commentary: Khaleel looks very confident while appealing for lbw, and it is given! De Kock has a chat with Rahul, and reviews. He went swiping across the line at this fullish ball, but seemed to have missed it entirely. Yup, there's no inside edge. It was on the fuller side of a length on middle and off, and angling in to show umpire's call on clipping the side of leg stump! De Kock is gone, but LSG retain the review

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: KL Rahul
commentary: now Pant goes up for a caught-behind chance, but it is turned down. And DC review despite having only one review in hand. Rahul went to slash at this length ball which was turning away after pitching wide of off, and UltraEdge does confirm a faint little nick off the bottom of the bat. So Kuldeep also has Rahul in his pocket. LSG in a hole at the moment.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: MP Stoinis
commentary: spooned to backward point! Simple catch for Ishant in front of his chest. Stoinis went hoicking across the line, and ended up getting the leading edge. Kuldeep strikes in his first over back. He tossed this up for Stoinis, and went on a full length around off. Stoinis went swiping, but the ball was slow, and it dipped, before chipping up in the air

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: N Pooran
commentary: bowled him! The man in form falls first ball. Pooran walks back a clueless man, as his off stump is flattened. Kuldeep is on a hat-trick. LSG losing their way after the powerplay, with Kuldeep taking the initiative for DC. This full ball dipped on off stump, with Pooran perhaps playing for the turn away, as he pushed at it outside off. But the ball sneaked through, and left him in a sour mood

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: DJ Hooda
commentary: taken at where an imaginary short point would have been! Warner signals that the ball seemed to curve away while in the air. Hood played the no-look pull off a ball which was not at all on a short of a length - it seemed to be on a good length, rather - with the line being around fifth stump. But Hooda, LSG's Impact Sub, seemed to have played early, and got a top edge to send the ball high up for a simple catch

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: A Badoni

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: KH Pandya
commentary: this is gone! There is a little sound as the ball goes into the keeper's gloves, and the finger goes up too. Mukesh banged this on a short of a length around sixth stump, while angling it in. The ball shaped back in, and cramped Pandya for room. He leapt a little to ride the bounce, but the ball ended up tickling his glove before going Pant's way

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: RR Pant
commentary: is there a twist? Pant can't get hold of this googly as he steps out to swing clean, misses it altogether and loses his bat in the process. Rahul effects the simplest of stumpings.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: T Stubbs

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: SD Hope

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: A Taide
commentary: Samson and Sen almost collide, but the latter holds on! Hard length, just outside leg. Follows Taide as he tries to back away. He then has a hack across the line but the lack of room means that the ball goes straight up off the top edge. Samson calls but Sen at short third man, does not seem to pay heed. In the end, the ball nestles into Sen's palms. Avesh, well, he was not best pleased. RR, remember, did something similar last year, when three fielders went for the same ball, only for none of them to catch it and for the ball to pop into Boult's hands eventually!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: JM Bairstow
commentary: oh dear, what has happened there!?! Floated up on a length outside off and this seems to stick in the surface. Bairstow, trying to go inside out, is way too early into the stroke. The ball seems to bounce a tad extra too and hits Bairstow pretty high on the bat. Loops up to extra cover, and Hetmyer makes no mistake. Bairstow's painstaking knock comes to an end. Maiden IPL wicket for Maharaj, and he is thrilled to bits. Not sure the Punjab Kings are, at this stage!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Prabhsimran Singh
commentary: Prabhsimran holes out! Dangles the carrot on a length on middle and off, and Prabhsimran bites. Steps down the track, trying to smash it into next week. He is hitting into the wind, though, and does not get it right out of the middle too. Spoons up off the inside half of the bat and Jurel does the rest at deep mid wicket. Wicket no.198 in the IPL for Yuzvendra Chahal!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: SM Curran
commentary: Captain Curran perishes too! Drops this shorter on off, and this seems to skid on a touch quicker than Curran expects. Tries to pull it away but gets it right off the bottom part of the bat. Arrows it straight to Jurel at deep mid wicket, and the Punjab Kings slip further into trouble!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: JM Sharma
commentary: soft dismissal! Punjab Kings take a step back after a step forward, again! Hard length outside off. With mid off up, Jitesh thinks he can muscle it over the fielder. The ball, though, gets big on him and he cloths it completely. An easy catch for Parag at mid off, and Avesh is elated. Finishes his celebratory jump right beside Jitesh, who is disappointed at having been dismissed in this fashion!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Shashank Singh
commentary: Sen breaks through! Banged into the track on off. Sen gets some extra bounce and this gets big on Shashank. He cannot control his pull and miscues it. Spoons up off the higher part of the bat, almost off the sticker, towards deep mid wicket. Jurel makes up ground to his left and completes the catch with minimal fuss. Just when PBKS' innings was threatening to click into gear, they suffer a setback!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: LS Livingstone
commentary: full on leg stump. Ashutosh tugs it towards deep mid wicket. Livingstone wanted the second but Ashutosh was not as interested. Livingstone has to rush back, and could be in trouble here...In fact, he is indeed an inch short. The throw was not over the stumps but Samson did well to collect it to his left and then flick the ball onto the stumps. Livingstone did seem to take the longer route back to his crease. Either way, this is just what PBKS did not need!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Harpreet Brar

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: YBK Jaiswal
commentary: Rabada gets rid of Jaiswal! Short, wide and this is there to be hit. Jaiswal throws the kitchen sink at it but it perhaps comes off the toe-end. Arrows towards Harshal at third man, and that is just the breakthrough the Kings would have wanted at this stage!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: SV Samson
commentary: big appeal, and given! Rabada has another, and this is a massive moment in the game! Hard length on off, and this cuts back in. Keeps low too and goes under Samson's attempted pull. Gets pinned on the back leg, and umpire Anil Chaudhary raises his finger. Samson has a quick chat with his partner and then reviews. This could be more in hope than expectation. And that is vindicated. Ball Tracking reckons the ball would have smashed into middle and leg, and Samson has to go. Takes a review along with him too!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: R Parag
commentary: gets the height, but not enough distance! Another twist in this tale! Dug in short on off. Parag thinks he can smash this into the stands but the ball does not arrive as quickly as he expects. Miscues it and the ball goes miles up towards deep mid wicket. Rabada settles under it and snares the chance!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: DC Jurel
commentary: another miscue, and another catch in the deep! Sensational catch by Shashank! Hard length on middle and leg. Skids onto Jurel and rushes him on the pull. Does not middle it at all and he cloths it towards deep mid wicket. Shashank tears in from the fence, slides forward and gobbles up the chance! RR's chase is flagging!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: SO Hetmyer

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: KA Maharaj
commentary: straight to long on! PBKS keep chipping away! Slower ball bowled right into the slot outside off. Maharaj gets his front foot out of the way and slugs at it. The bat turns upon impact, though, and he chunks it off the inside half of the bat towards long on. Livingstone makes no mistake this time, and RR need ten off the final over!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: TA Boult
Q de Kock
commentary: taken this time! de Kock perishes early! Fullish and slanted across the batter outside off. de Kock goes after it again, but does so with minimal footwork. Gets a thick outside edge and the ball floats to Narine at short third, who accepts the offering gleefully. Arora did not begin this over well, but he has certainly come back strong since!

name: KL Rahul
commentary: holes out to deep mid wicket! Russell gets Rahul! Another shortish ball, although this is on the stumps. Rahul, trying to up the ante, opens up his stance and swipes at it. Gets a decent piece of it but the only problem is that he hits it straight down Ramandeep's throat. Much easier catch, compared to earlier, and LSG lose their skipper!

name: DJ Hooda
commentary: taken superbly at backward point by Ramandeep Singh! Length in the channel just outside off. Nips away a smidgen with the angle too. Hooda tries to drive on the up but cannot keep it down. Skews off the outer half of the bat and arrows towards backward point, where Ramandeep flies to his right and snares it. He was almost parallel to the ground when he took that, and KKR will be chuffed with that wicket!

name: A Badoni
commentary: goes straight up, and Badoni bites the dust! Slowed up just a shade on a length outside off. Seems to drift away late too. Badoni tries the expansive sweep but cannot get to the pitch of the ball. Skews it off the top edge and the ball swirls towards deep backward square leg. Raghuvanshi circles under it, tracks it all the way and holds on. LSG keep losing wickets!

name: MP Stoinis
commentary: smart work by Salt, and Stoinis has to walk back! Tossed up a touch on a length outside off. Grips in the surface and rips back in. Stoinis does not account for that much turn and jams it off the inside edge into his pads. The ball pops up and Salt keeps his eyes on it all the way. Reacts quick enough and snaffles it sharply to his right, one-handed. KKR keep chipping away, and LSG, in trying to increase the tempo, have lost two in quick succession!

name: N Pooran
commentary: edged and gone! No Pooran pyrotechnics in the final over! Length delivery hung up a long way outside off. In fact, it was beyond the tramlines. Pooran went after it and because it was so far, he could only feather it through to Salt. Subdued celebrations, but this is a huge wicket, and could possibly alter the score by 10-12 runs, at least!

name: SP Narine
commentary: Narine will not dominate the powerplay tonight! Mohsin sticks to that hard length just outside off, and takes the pace off this time. Narine was always going to go after it, but the lack of pace means that he miscues it. Gets plenty of height, but not enough distance. Stoinis, stood at cover point and on the edge of the ring, does the rest!

name: A Raghuvanshi
commentary: Mohsin has two, and LSG are fighting back! Back of a length delivery slanted across the batter outside off. Goes on with the angle and forces Raghuvanshi to play at it. He does so without much conviction and nicks it through to Rahul. The easiest of catches for the LSG skipper, and Mohsin is pumped!

name: AM Rahane
commentary: survived off the previous delivery, but doesn't off this one. Mistimes a pull straight to Hardik at mid-on and Wankhede belts out a roar like no other. Rahane was done in by Coetzee's pace, got it high on the bat as he tried to play in front of square. The move to promote him up the order hasn't worked for CSK tonight.

name: R Ravindra
commentary: shapes for a cut but misses. This skidded threw off the pitch. Wait, there is a stifled appeal from Ishan, but it's not given. Mumbai opt for a review. No one seems really concerned, but guess what? Ultra edge confirms there was a tiny spike. Excellent review from Mumbai, credit to Ishan! Hardik didn't seem entirely convinced but went upstairs reluctantly. And Rachin has to walk back.

name: Ishan Kishan
commentary: Pathirana strikes first ball for CSK on his return from injury! Kishan picks out Thakur at midwicket. Very full and on the pads, Kishan nails this but hits it straight to the infielder

name: SA Yadav
commentary: Mustafizur clings onto the catch at the deep-third boundary. Banged in short and wide of off, SKY uses the pace and bounce of Pathirana and upper-cuts it in the air. Mustafizur catches the ball with both hands at the edge of the boundary. But the momentum causes him to tumble. He scoops the ball up in the air, then jumps back into the field of play to catch it with both hands once again. Sensational effort at the boundary. Even coach Fleming has a smile on his face. A Sri Lankan and a Bangladeshi celebrate. Look at the PDA. SKY falls for a duck

name: NT Tilak Varma
commentary: Pathirana comes back and provides CSK with the breakthrough. Back of a length and into the pitch at 140kph. Slower ball at 140kph. Tilak swings early, loses his shape and plops it in the air. Thakur runs back and completes a terrific tumbling catch at mid-off. Pathirana is proving the point of difference in CSK's attack

name: HH Pandya
commentary: Mumbai boy Deshpande takes out the MI captain. Holes out to Jadeja at deep midwicket. Shoulder-high short ball just outside off. Hardik can't get on top of it and finds one of the world's best fielders in the deep

name: TH David
commentary: Some NZ love at the boundary. Ravindra takes it at long-off and gets a big hug from Mitchell. Another whippy cutter from Mustafizur, the line is wider. The line is right. David swings and holes out to long-off

name: R Shepherd
commentary: Nope. Pathirana knocks Shepherd over with a 149.3ks missile. Beaten for pace. Dhoni applauds him from behind the stumps. Not quite a yorker, very full and slings in, gathers pace off the pitch and knocks out the leg stump. Bam! What a sight for a fast bowler

name: Abhishek Sharma
commentary: whipped off the toes, out to deep square leg.... and finally a wicket for RCB! Topley in the wickets after that bruising first over. Abhishek couldn't make proper contact on his clip... but is this respite? Is it heck. Here's Heinrich!

name: TM Head
commentary: straight up in the air, du Plessis calls early and Head is gone! Made toom to leg again, Ferguson followed him into the blockhole, cramping the swing of his bat. A steepler to mid-off, but no mistake from the skipper. What a knock that was!

name: H Klaasen
commentary: wide full-toss, and looped to point! A tame end, but what an innings! Pace off from Ferguson, had he left it it might have been called as a wide. But he rightly wanted to place bat on ball at every opportunity. RCB finally have a third wicket!

name: V Kohli
commentary: Kohli has been castled! Chinnaswamy has been silenced because Markande has beaten the top-scorer of this IPL with some skill. Slows that down beautifully to 83.7kmh, it's a googly too, and Kohli goes for a sweep with hard hands but he misses it completely and looks back in horror

name: F du Plessis
commentary: tickled through to the keeper and the captain is gone! RCB are crumbling here all of a sudden. It was a slow bouncer which du PLessies tried to put away as the ball went over him, but all he managed was a thin edge

name: RM Patidar
shortText: c Nitish Kumar Reddy b Markande
commentary: holes out while attempting another big one! Pitched up on middle with some drift, Patidar swings big on the leg side towards the longest part of the boundary and he finds Nitish Reddy placed in between deep midwicket and long-on. Caught right at the rope

name: MK Lomror
commentary: chopped on and Cummins has got them a breakthrough again! Short ball with no room at all, rising on off stump as he rolls his fingers over it, and Lomror slices it with an inside edge onto his stumps. The crowd has gone silent again

name: PD Salt
commentary: that is a one-handed stunner from Avesh Khan! Salt slapped it back to Avesh's left and he had to stretch and go low quickly, and boy he did it just in time for the ball to stick in his palm. One of the catches of this IPL and Riyan Parag can breathe easy now

name: SP Narine
commentary: nails the yorker and that's the end of Narine! Swinging into the stumps, beats the bat and that knocks over leg stump in spectacular fashion. Boult goes over to shake Narine's hand immediately because he has played the knock of his life

name: A Raghuvanshi
commentary: straight to deep third! Finally some relief for Royals. Raghuvanshi has done his job though. He went after the short ball outside off with an upper square cut and kind of middled it too, but couldn't clear the fielder

name: SS Iyer
commentary: Chahal has got Shreyas now, at least for now! Given out on the field, Shreyas seemed ot have walked initially but has reviewed it. He went down on a knee for a slog-sweep but missed the ball and was hit on the back leg right in front off middle. No bat there, Shreyas has started to walk before seeing ball-tracking on the big screen, because it later shows it's hitting middle

name: AD Russell
commentary: slower one at 119.2kmh, pretty wide and Russell throws his bat at it but it's the lack of pace that ensures the ball only reaches the fielder at deep third

name: VR Iyer
commentary: the slow offcutter does it for Kuldeep! Full and just outside off, he goes after that and it's gone pretty high, Dhruv Jurel runs back from the circle and dives to his left to complete an excellent catch

name: YBK Jaiswal
commentary: gets his revenge as Vaibhav belts out a roar! Comes back superbly with a full delivery on off, this shape away late and Jaiswal is a tad late as he swings through without any feet movement, gets a thick edge and Venky Iyer pouches it nice and easy at slip.

name: SV Samson
commentary: you can't keep that man out! Sunil Narine with an excellent catch at mid-on as Samson goes. Harshit bowls hard length, this one gets Samson high on the bat as he attempts to loft it over the infield, doesn't control that and Narine takes a good catch moving a few steps backwards before timing his jump to perfection.

name: R Parag
commentary: he's got more elevation than distance and Russell takes the steepler at deep midwicket! Harshit rolled his fingers across the team as he bowled length at 113kph, Riyan fetched it from outside off as he attempted to heave this over long-on, didn't time it as well as he would've liked.

name: DC Jurel
commentary: gets it to spin back in to beat the inside edge as Jurel prods tentatively. May have been struck outside the line. KKR have reviewed the on-field call. Narine was ultra confident in his appeal and ball tracking confirms all three reds, so the original decision is reversed.

name: R Ashwin
commentary: picks out deep midwicket! Pressure was building, Ashwin looks for the release shot but doesn't time it off the middle as he pulls Chakravarthy's hard length. Excellent catch diving forward from Angkrish Raghuvanshi.

name: SO Hetmyer
commentary: he's chipped this straight to cover. Hetmyer can't believe what he has just done. The length ball sticks into the pitch, a direct consequence of there being no dew, Hetmyer is through with the shot very early. Soft dismissal.

name: TA Boult
commentary: drilled to long-off, calls for two but they were never going to make it. Boult was very slow in turning around, but in all fairness there was never a second. Boult continued to run nonetheless to get Buttler back on strike. Must say it was an excellent return on the bounce from Iyer to the bowler.

name: Shubman Gill
commentary: chipped to cover! Shaw there takes it just below his face. Ishant went with a full delivery just outside off, and the ball seemed to go on to Gill pretty slowly. He went slicing almost a bit late, with the bat face opening belatedly, and the ball chipping to Shaw

name: B Sai Sudharsan
commentary: direct hit at the non-striker's end! The umpire has gone to his TV colleague after Capitals appeal. And Sudharsan is clearly short, even as he dives back. The bat is well short, though. Length ball from Ishant just outside off, and Sudharsan clipped it towards midwicket. Sumit rushed towards the ball, and throw at the base of the stumps

name: DA Miller
commentary: loud and confident appeal for caught behind, but not given. Pant reviews after being nudged by Ishant and Fraser-McGurk at slip. Miller went pushing with a half-closed face of the bat, which was placed outside off. And he starts walking back after seeing the first replay. There was gap between bat and pad there, and the UltraEdge confirms Miller got an inside edge. And Pant did well to take that, diving to his left even as the ball was dying on to him. His gloves were on the ground when he took the ball. Ishant bowled on a short of a length again, and this one angled back in from outside off to finish on middle

name: A Manohar
commentary: Pant is delighted for a potential stumping... but this will go to the third umpire too. Manohar was trying to push at this length ball dipping just outside off, but was beaten on the outside edge. His back foot seems just outside the crease, and the third umpire concludes that no part of it is on the crease. So Pant stumps Manohar, as Stubbs strikes

name: R Tewatia
commentary: given out lbw after Axar's confident appeal. But Tewatia reviews. He went for the slog sweep at this length ball outside off, which turned in to hit him on middle on the side of his front knee. Replays show the ball turned in quite considerably, and it comes up as umpire's call on clipping the side of the leg stump. GT sliding further, with Rashid their only hope now

name: M Shahrukh Khan
commentary: wow, looks like this could be lucky for Pant and DC! Pant certainly seems thrilled. Shahrukh tried to swipe at this length ball which pitched outside leg, but the ball slid below his bat. He had taken a step or two down the pitch too, and as fortunate as it could get for Pant, the ball dropped off his glove and hit the leg stump. But the third umpire wants to confirm if it is the ball hitting the stumps, or the gloves. The stumps are hit, but it lights up a second or two later. Finally, the third umpire concludes that the ball has hit the stumps cleanly, with Shahrukh's back foot outside the crease. The ball is called wide, but it doesn't matter to DC - they have a wicket!

name: Rashid Khan
commentary: tickled to Pant! Rashid went upper-cutting at this short ball in the channel outside off, but played at it away from his body and while still in the crease. The ball took a faint top edge, as Pant took the catch with a reverse cup. GT's last hope is gone

name: MM Sharma
commentary: taken at deep backward point! Sumit was placed at deep point, but went to his left to take it low. Khaleel, from around the wicket to Mohit, went for the bouncer around sixth stump. Mohit rode the bounce by leaping in the crease, and went ramping at it. But the ball flew off the top edge, and went dipping on to Sumit

name: Noor Ahmad
commentary: bowled him! GT are cleaned up for 89. Noor has a swing at this length ball just outside off, but there is not foot movement even as he is deep in the crease, with his front leg out of the way. So Noor is beaten, and the ball strikes the side of the off stump

name: Abishek Porel
commentary: stumps rattled! Full and fast. On middle stump, and it is a you-miss-I-hit moment. Misses the flick across the line and Porel must go too. Repairwork needed on the poles

name: SD Hope
commentary: and Rashid strikes! Hope tries an expansive reverse sweep, but he doesn't get the elevation, and ends up hitting it to Mohit at conventional short third.

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Ishan Kishan
commentary: and he strikes first ball. No celebration from Rabada, only a laugh as he knows this was not a wicket ball. It was short and wide. Kishan went after it but didn't middle it. Brar at deep third wasn't exactly at the edge of the boundary line but he times his jump well to grab it with both hands

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: RG Sharma
commentary: down the track but it's a slower ball from Curran, back of the hand, bowled at 108.1kph. Rohit loses his shape, and the bottom hand comes of the bat as well, as he looks to go over extra cover. Gets an outside edge that goes towards backward point where Brar dives forward to grab it with both hands

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: SA Yadav
commentary: full and wide. Surya chases it and slices it towards backward point where Prabhsimran Singh, probably the shortest person on the field, leaps up and takes it with both hands

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: NT Tilak Varma

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: HH Pandya
commentary: a length ball. Hardik goes for the pull but the bottom hand comes off. Brar settles under it and pouches it well inside the boundary line

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: TH David
commentary: hard length outside off. David looks to hit it down the ground but fails to clear long-off

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: R Shepherd
commentary: a slower one, full on the stumps. Shepherd swings with the angle but cannot clear Shashank Singh at deep-backward square leg

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: SM Curran
commentary: Appeal from Kishan. A belated one. But Bumrah is quite convinced. Or is it about the ball brushing something? Wide given and Mumbai have reviewed. Fullish and angling in from around the stumps, Curran is on the back foot and looks to flick it away. Snicko returns a spike and Bumrah has two in the over! What a start. And he was the only one who seem to be certain about the nick. A feather of an edge and Mumbai have rattled the Kings

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Prabhsimran Singh
commentary: Flying Kishan in Mullanpur! Moves to his left and dives full length to pouch that. Coetzee is pumped up after an erratic start. Slants this into Prabhsimran on a length. He looks to swivel and pull but only gets a glove. The wicketkeeper does not miss and Mumbai are on the board.

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: LS Livingstone
commentary: Caught Coetzee, bowled Coetzee and Mumbai's celebrations continue. He takes a few steps forward to his left in his follow-through and takes a good, low catch to end Livingstone's night. Back of a length around off, rushed Livi for pace. He goes for the pull but ends up getting it back towards the bowler off the cue end. 150kph

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Harpreet Singh
commentary: Soft dismissal. Googly on a length, Bhatia goes back to punch it down to long-on but ends up chipping it back. Shreyas dives to his left and takes that

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Shashank Singh
commentary: And Bumrah answers Mumbai's call! Once again. The sheer dependability of this guy. My goodness. Starts off with a slower one - but the batter does not pick it, in the slot. Shashank thinks this one is there to be deposited straight over. Goes for the big shot and only skies it high up. Tilak runs in from short midwicket and takes it next to the pitch. What a bowler Bumrah is!

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: JM Sharma
commentary: Plumb lbw! Or so it seems. Jitesh opts to review. A full toss on middle and leg, Jitesh misses the flick and also falls over a touch. Perhaps surprised by the pace and height at which it arrived. Hits him below the knee roll on the front pad. Is it sliding down? Umpire's call on hitting the stumps

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: Harpreet Brar
commentary: Nonchalance? Nooooo! Finds Nabi on the fence! Sounded so good, looked like Brar connected. Length ball on middle, he moved across and played the pick-up shot over the on side. Unfortunately for him and Kings, found the fielder at deep backward square leg

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: HV Patel

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, Mullanpur
name: K Rabada
commentary: Full and wide outside off again, Rabada walks to the off side and crunches it through point. A flat throw but has Rabada made it? Nope. It is all over. Kishan does well to collect and disturb the stumps with Rabada inches out. Mumbai escape to a win! Ooof! Nabi with the rocket through from the deep

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: AM Rahane
commentary: got him! Rahane plays all across the line, trying to swing this length ball pushed through and hears the leg-stump rattled.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: R Ravindra
commentary: straight through him! That is an absolute corker first up. Slants one in full on the stumps from wide of the crease and Rachin nibbles down the wrong line as he tries to off-drive. The ball beats the inside edge to crash into the stumps.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: RA Jadeja

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: S Dube
commentary: excellent catch! Dube looks to fetch this pull from way outside off but ends up slicing it high in the air as Rahul calls for it and then hares forward to take it neatly. Didn't look like dropping it at any point.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: Sameer Rizvi
commentary: poor shot under the circumstances. Runs down the pitch to heave across the line, Krunal cleverly dragged his length back and got this to turn and Rahul effects the simplest of stumpings. Completely lost his shape.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: MM Ali
commentary: picks out deep midwicket this time. Didn't time it as well as he would've liked, Moeen's followthrough and his reaction as he hit it was a dead giveaway, but hey, he walks off to a rousing reception. Ekana stands.......because MS Dhoni's walking out

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: MS Dhoni

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: Q de Kock
commentary: Finally the breakthrough! The most low-key of celebrations there could be for a wicket. Back of a length, offcutter again, de Kock goes back to ramp it over the wicketkeeper but only manages a feather. Unable to get away from the line, too. Dhoni does the rest and de Kock walks. End of a stupendous opening partnership that all but seals it for LSG at home

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: KL Rahul
commentary: Jadeja flier ends Rahul's stay! Leaps to his left from backward point and dives to pluck it out. Wrings his left hand after the effort. Superb effort to end a top knock. He stands deep and cuts a length ball that is well outside off. But he couldn't get it past a flying Jaddu. Looks like the TV ump wants to check the fairness of the catch and it is all good. It was an umpire's review. Delays proceedings a touch

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: N Pooran

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
name: MP Stoinis
TM Head
commentary: Taken by Stubbs at long-on! Excellent, excellent catch there. Kuldeep bowls it on a length and Head goes back and looks to pull it down the ground. Does not get enough of it and Stubbs does well to run in a way and take that leaping forward. Kuldeep has his third and Head is denied a second IPL century in as many games

name: Abhishek Sharma
commentary: A blinder at cover and that's what it takes to stop this stunning assault! Full outside off, Abhishek looks to hammer it through cover but Axar throws himself low at it and holds on. Abhishek misses out on a much deserved half-century

name: AK Markram
