commentary: Another stunning catch, this time by Sanvir Singh at mid-on! Or is it? The umpires are having a look. Sanvir looks confident though. Back of a length ball that rushes on to Stoinis. He is a touch late on the pull and miscues his pull towards mid-on. The ball is dying on Sanvir, but he hares to his right, dives forward and takes the catch inches off the ground. Absolute stunner

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: KH Pandya
commentary: Birthday boy Cummins nails a direct hit at the non-striker's end. Has he conjured a wicket out of nowhere? Oh, he has. Fielding brilliance on show again. Krunal backs away to a length ball and sets off for a quick run. But think he has hit it too well, and the ball goes at a good height to Cummins who sends the middle stump splat

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: N Pooran

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: A Badoni

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: Abhishek Sharma

venue: Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, Hyderabad
name: TM Head

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: V Kohli
commentary: dropped on 0, dropped on 10, caught on 92! Chasing his 100th hundred in all formats and only eight runs away from the IPL's 100th hundred, Virat Kohli falls at deep extra cover. Arshdeep went full and wide and Kohli sliced this shot well, perhaps too well! Flies into the hands of Rossouw few metres inside the boundary line and Kohli must go. Kohli swings the bat around his head like a lasso to acknowledge the crowd's response

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: F du Plessis
commentary: There's his maiden wicket! Gets some extra bounce with this short and wide ball. Du Plessis tries to slap it over extra cover but ends up slicing it more towards deep point. Boundary rider makes no mistake

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: RM Patidar
commentary: smart catch from Bairstow as Curran pushes it full and wide again. Patidar reaches out to guide one behind point, but got a thick edge on this occasion. Out for a smart 55

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: MK Lomror
commentary: Harshal moves to No. 1 on the purple cap list as Lomror's off-stump gets knocked back. Dipping slower-ball yorker, with the line closer to off stump this time. Lomror swings across the line, ball sneaks under the bat, and the bails get splayed

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: Swapnil Singh

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: Prabhsimran Singh
commentary: pinned in front, up goes the finger! Plumb lbw and Prabhsimran won't be reviewing... Swapnil strikes in his first over, sliding the ball in with the angle to beat the inside edge and rap the batter on the knee. Squared up on the crease, Looked a very straightforward decision

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: JM Bairstow
commentary: Du Plessis, you beauty! From mid-off, he senses the ball will go over his head, so he turns with his face away from the action, and then tracks the ball coming over his shoulder, before diving full stretch to take a catch. Overpitched ball outside off and Bairstow tried to loft it over the infield, but the ball came off the bat's toe. Important breakthrough

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: Shashank Singh
commentary: tucked into the leg side, they are pushing hard for two more... Kohli tears in and underarms into the stumps, and RCB are celebrating! Shashank is inches short here! Just as with Rossouw, he is dismissed the ball after requiring treatment for an injury! He walks off less than gruntled, and Kings are sinking. Kohli with the magic in the field, and boy doesn't he enjoy those moments. Hared in from deep midwicket, pounced and threw into the ground while in midair, then celebrated like a boss as the replays confirmed the dsmissal!

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: JM Sharma
commentary: bowled 'im! Ripping legbreak, hits the top of off. Karn roars and punches the air in celebration - and why not? It was a lovely bit of bowling. Pitched on a length around leg stump and spinning sharply across the bows as Jitesh went for the big ole slog over the leg side

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: LS Livingstone
commentary: leading edge to cover, another one goes! Livingstone closes the face looking to turn the ball to leg and merely sends a looping catch into the off side. Swapnil gets his second of the night and it is looking increasingly like curtains for PBKS

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: SM Curran
commentary: kerrrrrrrr-splat! Off stump out of the ground, RCB closing in. Superbly bowled by Ferguson, who rocks out what looks like a fiendish legcutter that dips and grips to beats Curran's swing on the inside and send Kings' captain on his way

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: HV Patel
commentary: full and flicked... straight to the man back! Harshal picks out deep backward square leg, well held by Ferguson as he steadied himself out by the rope. Golden duck for Harshal and this goose is almost fully cooked

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: RD Chahar

venue: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium, Dharamsala
name: Arshdeep Singh
commentary: plinked to mid-on, it's red rover for PBKS! A limp swipe and the ball nearly dies on Karn Sharma has he stumbles in to complete the catch. Doesn't need to be perfect, because the scorecard already looks good for RCB - victors by 60 runs

name: B Sai Sudharsan
commentary: the wide lines have kept them quiet, and now brings them the first wicket. Slower ball, far away from his reach, Sudharsan nearly sweeps himself off his feet trying to hit this, but can only go as far as extra cover. Joint-highest opening partnership in IPL

name: Shubman Gill
commentary: what an over from Deshpande. No boundary plus two wickets. Looks like Gill has lost power. Slower short ball and all he manages is a catch to deep midwicket

name: M Shahrukh Khan
commentary: just one boundary in the last three overs. This is a slot ball but he has hit it straight to deep midwicket. SRK sacrifices himself trying to run that extra run

name: AM Rahane
commentary: it's two in two for Gujarat Titans! Warrier strikes first ball, the home crowd dressed in yellow is loving it for reasons I can't comprehend. In the channel outside of with some outswing, Rahane merely chips the ball down with hesitation after the ball shapes away and Tewatia completes a really good catch running to his left

name: R Ravindra
commentary: is that a run out in the first over? Nice and tight to end the over, short of length ball on off and Rahane drops it close to himself with soft hands and Ravindra hares across to pinch a single, but it's a direct hit from Miller who swoops in from point and hits the stumps with an underarm throw to catch Ravindra achingly short of the crease

name: MM Ali
commentary: a spectacular diving catch by Noor at the boundary ends Moeen's innings! It was the short ball around off, Moeen gave that pull his everything and it went very high towards the long-on boundary where Noor got under it before diving towards his left and grabbing it with both hands

name: S Dube
commentary: another good catch for Noor, anther wicket for Mohit and that's the end of Dube! Slow full toss, Dube swings down the ground but doesn't get much distance and Noor dives forward from deep midwicket to hang on to it

name: RA Jadeja
commentary: straight down long-on's throat! Flat and quick, much fuller, and Jadeja wants to go big down the ground but can't get much distance. Miller hardly moves to pouch that one

name: MJ Santner
commentary: gone this time, there goes the leg stump! Santner puts his front foot aside for the big hit but the ball hurries through him to rattle into the stumps
